name: instagram-fit-select
description: Pick a hero selfie/fit/makeup shot for Instagram + caption pack (user posts manually)

steps.text: Skill: instagram-selfie-selector. User describes options A/B/C or pastes notes. No auto-post to Instagram. Privacy first.

steps.prompt: Using skill instagram-selfie-selector and knowledge/social/instagram-selfie-playbook.md: if the user listed multiple looks, run select-hero + slay-score; if outfit-heavy fit-check; if glam-heavy makeup-check. Always include caption-pack (3 captions, alt text, light hashtags) and post-safety. Tone: hype-honest, no body shame, no fake viral claims. If no options given, ask for goal (feed/Story/Reel), vibe, and 2–5 labeled options. User posts manually in Instagram.
